title: ophryosporus angustifolius
intro: Ophryosporus angustifolius, a plant species also known as the Narrow-leaf Ophryosporus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Ophryosporus angustifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
